# Grand Polo Club & Resort
> thegrandpolo.com — Luxury Equestrian Villas by Emaar in Dubai

## Overview
Grand Polo Club & Resort is Emaar Properties' flagship equestrian-themed masterplan community in Dubai, spanning 5.54 million square metres with 22 residential clusters, 6,661 residences, 3 championship polo fields, a 5,600 SqM luxury clubhouse, and private stables.

## Available Properties
- **Chevalia Estate** — 5-Bedroom Villas from AED 9M | 6,516 sqft BUA | Q4 2028
- **Chevalia Estate 2** — 4 & 5-Bedroom Villas from AED 7.88M | Q2 2029
- **Chevalia Fields** — 4 & 5-Bedroom Villas from AED 7.34M | Q1 2029

## Key Features
- 3 Championship Polo Fields (340,000 SqM)
- 5,600 SqM Luxury Clubhouse
- Private Stables & 3 Riding Arenas
- Galloping Fountain, Art Pavilion, Floral Garden
- 23 World-Class Amenities
- Golden Visa Eligible (all properties)
- 5 min from Al Maktoum Int'l Airport
- 10 min from Expo City
- 30 min from Downtown Dubai

## Payment Plan
10% Down Payment + 10% Instalments at Construction Milestones + 20% on Completion

## Developer
Emaar Properties PJSC — Developer of Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, Dubai Marina

## Sister Property
- The Oasis by Emaar: oasisemaar.com / theoasisemaar.com
